case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. SEAN O'NEILL CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SEAN O'NEILL CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAN O'NEILL CONSTRUCTION $15,985.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,608.47 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,893.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
